data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Two-button retake dialog (Stage / Retake Now) correctly implements the spec: Stage applies state+reason only; Retake Now stages then starts a Take session with existing-session, rolling-ancestor, and start-failure guards. Repo-scoping extraction into retake-session-scope.ts (commits 3cd8bf7c, c92de1df) correctly prevents cross-repo beat ID collisions in shipping index, parent index, and terminal lookups. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2062 tests, build ok). SHIPMENT NOTE: branch diverges from main on filter-bar.tsx/bulk-edit test (missing Apply button merge ee3ef1dc) — cherry-pick only 3cd8bf7c and c92de1df to avoid regressing that feature.
